description: This Java class defines configuration properties for notification services within a Spring Boot application. It encapsulates settings related to enabling notifications, provider configurations for email and SMS channels, and specific properties for third-party services like SendGrid, Mailjet, and Twilio. These properties are typically populated from application.yml or application.properties files.

classes.name: NotificationProperties
classes.description: Main configuration class for notification settings, including flags, channel configurations, third-party API credentials, and nested static classes for specific channel configurations.

classes.name: ChannelProperties
classes.description: Nested static class defining provider-specific configuration for notification channels such as provider name and sender identity.

classes.name: SendGridProperties
classes.description: Nested static class encapsulating SendGrid API credentials and endpoint URL.

classes.name: MailjetProperties
classes.description: Nested static class encapsulating Mailjet API credentials and endpoint URL.

classes.name: TwilioProperties
classes.description: Nested static class encapsulating Twilio API credentials and endpoint URL.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Returns whether notifications are enabled.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Sets the enabled flag for notifications.

methods.name: getEmail
methods.description: Returns the email channel configuration.

methods.name: getSms
methods.description: Returns the SMS channel configuration.

methods.name: getOfficerEmail
methods.description: Gets the contact email for the officer.

methods.name: setOfficerEmail
methods.description: Sets the contact email for the officer.

methods.name: getOfficerPhone
methods.description: Gets the contact phone number for the officer.

methods.name: setOfficerPhone
methods.description: Sets the contact phone number for the officer.

methods.name: getSendgrid
methods.description: Returns the SendGrid configuration properties.

methods.name: getMailjet
methods.description: Returns the Mailjet configuration properties.

methods.name: getTwilio
methods.description: Returns the Twilio configuration properties.

methods.name: getProvider
methods.description: Returns the provider key within ChannelProperties.

methods.name: setProvider
methods.description: Sets the provider key within ChannelProperties.

methods.name: getFrom
methods.description: Returns the 'from' identity (email address or phone number) within ChannelProperties.

methods.name: setFrom
methods.description: Sets the 'from' identity within ChannelProperties.

methods.name: getApiKey
methods.description: Returns the API key for SendGrid or Mailjet.

methods.name: setApiKey
methods.description: Sets the API key for SendGrid or Mailjet.

methods.name: getApiSecret
methods.description: Returns the API secret for Mailjet.

methods.name: setApiSecret
methods.description: Sets the API secret for Mailjet.

methods.name: getAccountSid
methods.description: Returns the account SID for Twilio.

methods.name: setAccountSid
methods.description: Sets the account SID for Twilio.

methods.name: getAuthToken
methods.description: Returns the authentication token for Twilio.

methods.name: setAuthToken
methods.description: Sets the authentication token for Twilio.
